body:
Quick reply — will follow up properly tomorrow.

— Randy
subject: Re: Desert Bloom — Tuesday's session?

body:
Mum — one-thirty works fine. I'll do the Sabino loop first and swing by Desert Roasters for the dark roast on the way. Save me a corner piece.

— R
subject: Re: Sunday dinner at the house?

body:
Diana — pulling the sponsor list together for Under the Stars. Gold tier is holding at three, Silver at five, and Sonoran Desert Credit Union is close. I'll get the packet to Gloria for the books before the board meeting, and we should lock the guest-ranch deposit for Oct 3 this week.

— Randy
subject: Gala sponsor list — Gold and Silver tiers

body:
Rosa — for Monday: please keep me off the calendar before ten so I can clear the Vega witness list with Frank, then the pretrial at eleven. If the clinic intake folder came back from the printer, leave it on my desk. Thanks for covering the handoff.

— Randy
subject: Monday docket handoff
